'''BGMI Rising''' is a showmatch between 64 streamers and professional players celebrating the comeback of BGMI.

==About== 
===Broadcast Talent===
{{BroadcasterCard
|position=Commentator |language=
|b1=Ocean
|b2=AnkiiiBOT
|b3=Mazy
|b4=Spero
}}

===Format===
'''BGMI Rising''' : ''June 1st-4th
* '''Group Stage''' : ''June 1st-2nd
** 64 teams will divide in 4 groups 
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8}} from each group will qualify for semi finals
** Squad {{Abbr/TPP}}
* '''Semi Finals''' : ''June 3rd
** 32 teams
** Teams are divided equally in 4 groups of 8.
** All groups play against each other in a round-robin format.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16}} teams qualify for finals.
* '''Finals''' : ''June 4th
** 16 teams.
** 6 matches.
